mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, role, created_at as createdAt, deleted_at as deletedAt FROM member WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, role, created_at as createdAt, deleted_at as deletedAt FROM member WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( username, password_hash, role, created_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, role, created_at as createdAt FROM member
deleted_at IS NULL AND role = 'USER'
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, username, role, created_at as createdAt FROM member WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND role = 'ADMIN' ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member
deleted_at IS NULL AND role = 'USER'
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, deleted_at as deletedAt FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
